app.description: TanStack Start learning application for catalog, lesson, biography, authentication, and practice workflows.

domain.description: Server-side content access, curriculum navigation, authentication, grading, and PostgreSQL persistence behavior.

experience.description: Responsive learner-facing routes, catalog navigation, lesson and story readers, and shared quiz interactions.

math-authoring.description: Math lesson ledger, authoring, validation, PDF generation, exercise-deck, and database persistence workflows.

story-authoring.description: Public-domain biography conversion, outlining, chapter and question authoring, validation, and persistence workflows.
